mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM erp_member WHERE status = 'ACTIVE') AS total_members, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM erp_member WHERE member_type = 'NEWCOMER' AND join_date >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE)) AS newcomers, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM erp_ministry_volunteer WHERE status = 'ACTIVE') AS active_volunteers, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM erp_event WHERE event_date >= CURRENT_DATE AND status = 'ACTIVE') AS upcoming_events, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(amount) FROM erp_offering WHERE offering_date >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE)), 0) AS monthly_income, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(amount) FROM erp_expense WHERE expense_date >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE)), 0) AS monthly_expense, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM erp_worship WHERE worship_date >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE)) AS worship_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM erp_course WHERE status = 'ACTIVE') AS course_count

SELECT a.attend_date, COALESCE(w.worship_type, 'UNKNOWN') AS worship_type, COUNT(CASE WHEN a.status = 'PRESENT' THEN 1 END) AS present_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN a.status = 'ABSENT' THEN 1 END) AS absent_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN a.status = 'LATE' THEN 1 END) AS late_count, COUNT(*) AS total_count FROM erp_attendance a LEFT JOIN erp_worship w ON a.worship_id = w.worship_id WHERE TO_CHAR(a.attend_date, 'YYYY') = #{year} AND TO_CHAR(a.attend_date, 'MM') = #{month} GROUP BY a.attend_date, w.worship_type ORDER BY a.attend_date

SELECT offering_date, offering_type, SUM(amount) AS total_amount, COUNT(*) AS count FROM erp_offering WHERE TO_CHAR(offering_date, 'YYYY') = #{year} AND TO_CHAR(offering_date, 'MM') = #{month} GROUP BY offering_date, offering_type ORDER BY offering_date

SELECT d.dept_name, COUNT(DISTINCT v.volunteer_id) AS volunteer_count, COUNT(DISTINCT s.schedule_id) AS schedule_count, COUNT(DISTINCT r.report_id) AS report_count FROM erp_ministry_dept d LEFT JOIN erp_ministry_volunteer v ON d.dept_id = v.dept_id AND v.status = 'ACTIVE' LEFT JOIN erp_ministry_schedule s ON d.dept_id = s.dept_id AND (#{year} IS NULL OR TO_CHAR(s.schedule_date, 'YYYY') = #{year}) LEFT JOIN erp_ministry_report r ON d.dept_id = r.dept_id AND (#{year} IS NULL OR TO_CHAR(r.report_date, 'YYYY') = #{year}) GROUP BY d.dept_id, d.dept_name ORDER BY d.dept_name
